config.script:
"""
		Written By: Gaurav Amrutkar
		Written Date: 27/05/2024
		Purpose: Reset all values. 
	"""
	# Write your script here	
	system.perspective.closeDock('rightP')
	system.perspective.openDock("rightView")
	headerLabel = "Add"
	messageType = 'ErrorProofPanelQG'
	payload = {'headerLabel':headerLabel,'BOM':-1,'AreaId':-1,'LineId':-1,'WorkStationId':-1,'Part':-1,'Description':'','IsActive': 1,'UnitId':0,'ALTERNATEPART':''}		 			
	system.perspective.sendMessage(messageType, payload, scope = 'page' )

"""
		Written By: Gaurav Amrutkar
		Written Date: 27/05/2024
		Purpose: Reset all values. 
	"""	
	# Write your script here	
	system.perspective.closeDock('rightP')
	system.perspective.openDock("rightView")
	headerLabel = "Add"
	messageType = 'ErrorProofPanelQG'
	payload = {'headerLabel':headerLabel,'BOM':-1,'AreaId':-1,'LineId':-1,'WorkStationId':-1,'Part':-1,'Description':'','IsActive': 1,'ALTERNATEPART':'','OrderSequence':''}		 			
	system.perspective.sendMessage(messageType, payload, scope = 'page' )

"""
		Written By: Gaurav Amrutkar
		Written Date: 27/05/2024
		Purpose: Add/Update values into db. 
	"""
	import re
	try:
		check=0
		UnitId = self.view.custom.UnitId
		headerLabel = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntHeader").getChild("lblHeader").props.text
		BOM = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntBOM").getChild("drpBOM").props.value
		AreaId = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntArea").getChild("drpArea").props.value
		LineId = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntLine").getChild("drpLine").props.value
		WorkStationId = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntStation").getChild("drpWorkStation").props.value
		IsActive = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntIsActive").getChild("drpIsActive").props.value
		Part = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntPart").getChild("drpPart").props.value		
		Description = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntDescription").getChild("txt").props.text
		CurrentUserId=self.session.custom.loggedInUserId
		alternatePart = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntPartAlternate").getChild("drpPart").props.value
		system.perspective.print(alternatePart)
		AltParts = ''
		OrderSequence=self.parent.parent.getChild("cntSequence").getChild("txt").props.text
		if alternatePart != "" and alternatePart != None and str(alternatePart).upper() != str(None).upper() :
			for i in alternatePart:
				AltParts += str(system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/ErrorProof/getPartNumberFromId",{"M_Material_Id":i})) + ', '
#				AltParts += str(int(i))	+', '	####Check Present Data
			system.perspective.print("AltParts %s"%AltParts)
		params={'BOMId':BOM,'WorkStationId':WorkStationId,'MaterialId':Part}
		dbdata = system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/Master/ErrorProofingConfigurationQG/CheckData",params)
		pydbdata=system.dataset.toPyDataSet(dbdata)
		res = dbdata.getRowCount()
		system.perspective.print("BOM Value & WorkStationId:%s, %s"%(BOM,WorkStationId))
		#if res>0:
		#	WS=1
		#	state = 'error'
	    #   message = "Given Part is already present against selected Workstation & BOM"
		if(str(headerLabel) == 'Add'):
		    params = {"Id":0,"Area":AreaId,"Line":LineId,"WorkStation":WorkStationId,"BOM":BOM,"Part":Part,"Description":Description,"CreatedBy":CurrentUserId,"Active":IsActive,"ALTERNATEPART":AltParts,"OrderSequence":OrderSequence}
		    result = system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/Master/ErrorProofingConfigurationQG/InsertUpdate",params)
		    Id=0
		    for row in result:
				res = row[0]	
		    if(int(res) > 0):	
		        state = 'success'
		        message = "Record added successfully"
		        auditMsg= str(Description)+ " " + message + " to WorkStationId=" + str(WorkStationId)
		    else:
		        state = 'error'
		        message = "Record not added. Please contact system administrator."
		elif str(headerLabel) == 'Edit':
			Id=self.view.custom.UnitId
			# Retrieve existing record from the database
			params={'ErrorProofId':UnitId}
			res=system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/Master/ErrorProofingConfigurationQG/CheckRowData",params)
			print res
			val=system.dataset.toPyDataSet(res)
			dbWorkStation=0
			dbBOM=0
			dbpart=0
			for row in val:
			    dbWorkStation=row['MST_WorkStation_Id']
			    dbBOM=row['M_BOM_Id']
			    dbpart=row['M_Material_Id']
			system.perspective.print ("Database Values")	
			system.perspective.print ("%s,%s,%s"%(dbBOM,dbWorkStation,dbpart))
			system.perspective.print("Selected Part&Id:%s,%s"%(Part,UnitId))
			# Check if the existing BOM and WorkStationId match the new values
			if dbBOM == BOM and dbWorkStation == WorkStationId:
			    if int(dbpart) != int(Part):
			        system.perspective.print("Check at line 65")
			        for i in pydbdata:
			            Partpydbdata=i['M_Material_Id']
			            UnitIdpydbdata=i['MST_ErrorProofQG_Id']
			            check = 0
#			            if Part == Partpydbdata and UnitId != i['MST_ErrorProofQG_Id']:
#			                state = 'error'
#			                message = "Cannot update Part. Another record with the same BOM and WorkStationId already exists."
#			                check=1
#			                break
#			            else:
#			                check=0
			        if check == 0:
						system.perspective.print("Line 80")
						params = {"Id": UnitId, "Area": AreaId, "Line": LineId, "WorkStation": WorkStationId, "BOM": BOM,"Part": Part,"Description": Description, "CreatedBy": CurrentUserId, "Active": IsActive,"ALTERNATEPART":AltParts,"OrderSequence":OrderSequence}
						system.perspective.print(params)
						result = system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/Master/ErrorProofingConfigurationQG/InsertUpdate",params)
						for row in result:
						    res = row[0]
						if int(res) > 0:
						    state = 'success'
						    message = "Record updated successfully"
						    auditMsg= str(Description)+ " " + message + " to WorkStationId=" + str(WorkStationId)
						else:
						    state = 'error'
						    message = "Record not updated. Please contact the system administrator."
			    else:
			    	system.perspective.print("Line 92")
			        # If Part is the same, proceed with the update
			        params = {"Id": UnitId, "Area": AreaId, "Line": LineId, "WorkStation": WorkStationId, "BOM": BOM,
			                  "Part": Part, "Description": Description, "CreatedBy": CurrentUserId, "Active": IsActive,"ALTERNATEPART":AltParts,"OrderSequence":OrderSequence}
			        system.perspective.print(params)
			        result = system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/Master/ErrorProofingConfigurationQG/InsertUpdate",params)
			        for row in result:
			            res = row[0]
			        if int(res) > 0:
			            state = 'success'
			            message = "Record updated successfully"
			            auditMsg= str(Description)+ " " + message + " to WorkStationId=" + str(WorkStationId)
			        else:
			            state = 'error'
			            message = "Record not updated. Please contact the system administrator."
			else:
			    # If BOM or WorkStationId is different, allow the update
			    system.perspective.print("Line 107")
			    params = {"Id": UnitId, "Area": AreaId, "Line": LineId, "WorkStation": WorkStationId, "BOM": BOM,
			              "Part": Part, "Description": Description, "CreatedBy": CurrentUserId, "Active": IsActive,"ALTERNATEPART":AltParts,"OrderSequence":OrderSequence}
			    result = system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/Master/ErrorProofingConfigurationQG/InsertUpdate",params)
			    for row in result:
			        res = row[0]
			    if int(res) > 0:
			        state = 'success'
			        message = "Record updated successfully"
			        auditMsg= str(Description)+ " " + message + " to WorkStationId=" + str(WorkStationId)
			    else:
			        state = 'error'
			        message = "Record not updated. Please contact the system administrator."
		
		Project_VECV.PopUp.Alerts.showAlert(str(state), str(state.capitalize()), str(message), "true", "Okay", "", "", "", "", "closePopup", "closePopup", "closePopup","","","","")
		system.perspective.closeDock('rightp')
		system.perspective.openDock("rightView")
		messageType = 'tableRefresh'			
		system.perspective.sendMessage(messageType,scope = 'page' )
		messageType = 'DataClear'			
		system.perspective.sendMessage(messageType,scope = 'page' )
		
		#addToAuditLogStrat
		system.perspective.print(auditMsg)
		category='Master Configuration'
		subCategory='ErrorProofing Configuration'
		if(Id!=0):
			prevDesc=self.view.getChild("root").custom.payload
			#curDesc={"linetypecode":LineTypeCode, "mode":mode, "isActive":isActive, "Code":bomId }
			curDesc = {
				"BOM":BOM,
				"AreaId":AreaId,
				"LineId":LineId,
				"WorkStationId":WorkStationId,
				"IsActive":IsActive,
				"Part":Part	
			}
			system.perspective.print(prevDesc)
			system.perspective.print(curDesc)
			description=str(auditMsg)+" Where ID="+str(Id)+" With Previous Data->"+str(prevDesc)+" and Updated Data->"+str(curDesc)
		else:
			description=str(auditMsg)
		createdBy=self.session.custom.loggedInUserId
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddAuditLogs(category, subCategory, description, createdBy)
		#addAuditLogEnd
		
	except:
		screenName ='ErrorProofing Configuration'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Pannel/ErProofPannel')  
		errorFunction = str('Event:onActionPerformed -> cntSave/btn_Save')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber) 
	#End of except block

messageHandlers.script:
# implement your handler here
	load=payload.copy()
	#system.perspective.print("Printing payload of msg handler----------->")
	#system.perspective.print(payload)
	load.pop('headerLabel')
	load.pop('UnitId')
	#system.perspective.print("msg handler1----------->")
	import json
	load_json = json.dumps(load)
	self.view.getChild("root").custom.payload=load_json
	#system.perspective.print("msg handler2----------->")
	#system.perspective.print("payload msghandler3------------->")
	#system.perspective.print(self.view.getChild("root").custom.payload)

transforms.code:
pyvalue=system.dataset.toPyDataSet(value)
	val=''
	for row in pyvalue:
		val = row[0]
	return val

onChange.script:
"""
		Written By: Gaurav Amrutkar
		Written Date: 04/09/2024
		Purpose: Check Special character in text. 
	"""
	import re
	 
	def contains_special_characters(input_string):
	    # Define a regex pattern for special characters
	    pattern = r'[^a-zA-Z0-9_ ]'
	    
	    # Search for special characters
	    if re.search(pattern, input_string):
	        return True
	    else:
	        return False
	 
	# Calling Special Character Check Function
	input_string = self.props.text
	if contains_special_characters(input_string):
	    self.props.text = str(self.props.text)[:-1]

transforms.code:
pyData = system.dataset.toPyDataSet(value)
	optionList = []
	for data in pyData:
		dict = {}
		dict["value"] = data['Id']
		dict["label"] = data['Value']
		optionList.append(dict)
	return optionList

onChange.script:
if str(self.props.selected).upper() == 'TRUE'.upper():
		self.getSibling("drpPart").position.height = 40
		self.getSibling("drpPart").meta.visible = True
		self.parent.position.height = 100
	else:
		self.getSibling("drpPart").position.height = 0
		self.getSibling("drpPart").meta.visible = False
		self.parent.parent.getChild("cntDescription").getChild("txt").props.text=''
		self.parent.position.height = 60

messageHandlers.script:
"""
		Written By: Gaurav Amrutkar
		Written Date: 27/05/2024
		Purpose: Insert Row values into panel fields. 
	"""
	try:
		"""
			Written By: Gaurav Amrutkar
			Written Date: 27/05/2024
			Purpose: Insert Row values into panel fields. 
		"""
		# implement your handler here
		self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntHeader").getChild("lblHeader").props.text = payload['headerLabel']
		self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntBOM").getChild("drpBOM").props.value = payload['BOM']
		
		self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntArea").getChild("drpArea").props.value = payload['AreaId']
		self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntIsActive").getChild("drpIsActive").props.value = int(payload['IsActive'])
		self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntLine").getChild("drpLine").props.value = payload['LineId']
		self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntStation").getChild("drpWorkStation").props.value = payload['WorkStationId']
		self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntPart").getChild("drpPart").props.value = payload['Part']
		self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntSequence").getChild("txt").props.text= payload['OrderSequence']
		
		value = str(payload['ALTERNATEPART']).split(',')
		system.perspective.print(value)
		AltParts = []
		for i in value:
			system.perspective.print(" inside LOOP m_bom= %s"%payload['BOM'])
			if str(i).upper() != 'NONE'.upper() and i.strip() != '':
				system.perspective.print(" inside LOOP I= %s"%i)
				
				AltParts.append(str(system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/ErrorProofQG/getPartNumberFromId",{"M_Material_Id":i.strip(),"M_BOM_Id":payload['BOM']})))
				#AltParts.append(int(i))
				system.perspective.print(" inside LOOP AltParts= %s"%AltParts)
		
		if len(AltParts) > 0:
			self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntPartAlternate").getChild("Checkbox").props.selected = True
			self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntPartAlternate").getChild("drpPart").props.value = AltParts
		else:
			self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntPartAlternate").getChild("Checkbox").props.selected = False
			self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntPartAlternate").getChild("drpPart").props.value = []
			
		self.view.custom.UnitId = payload['UnitId']
		system.perspective.print(" unit id %s"%self.view.custom.UnitId)
		system.perspective.print("In msg handler:%s"%self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntIsActive").getChild("drpIsActive").props.value)
		
		self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntPartAlternate").getChild("Checkbox").props.selected = False
		
		if not AltParts:
			self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntPartAlternate").getChild("Checkbox").props.selected=False
		else:
			self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntPartAlternate").getChild("Checkbox").props.selected=True
	except Exception as e:
	    system.perspective.print("Validation error: %s" % str(e))
